# Eli Masechaba

> Business Consultant & Fuel Industry Specialist, Wits Business School alumna, delivering strategic solutions across business consulting and the fuel industry.

This is a static, AI-crawler-accessible mirror of elimasechaba.com, published here because the live WordPress site's hosting-level security (Imunify360 WAF) blocks AI crawler access at the server. Content below reflects the same information published on the main site.

## Business Consulting
Strategic advisory and board-level consulting under the Ascentpeak brand.

## Fuel Industry
Fuel sector partnerships and wholesale distribution under the FuelZone brand.

## Contact
See contact details on the main site: https://elimasechaba.com
